title: Magical Melty English Peppers Cornish Pasty
description: A sweet and savory English dish featuring peppers and a glassy jelly filling, wrapped in a dairy-free friendly Cornish pasty, served on a slate tile.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together flour and salt to make pastry dough.
Add cold vegan butter to flour mixture and use a pastry blender to work it into a crumbly mixture.
Gradually add cold water to mixture and stir until a dough forms.
Roll out dough on a floured surface to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
In a large skillet, heat vegetable oil over medium heat and saute chopped onion and minced garlic until softened.
Add sliced english peppers to skillet and continue to cook until tender.
Stir in apple jelly, salt, and black pepper to create filling.
Spoon filling onto one half of the dough circle, leaving a 1/2 inch border around edges.
Fold other half of dough over filling and press edges to seal.
Place pasty on a slate tile and bake for 25-30 minutes, or until golden brown.
